evaluation.summary: The RMT-corrected Chebyshev bias analysis and LDAB validation did not support any of the proposed hypotheses, indicating that the claimed breakthrough was not achieved.
next_directions: Re-examine the RMT covariance model assumptions and improve variance estimation
Develop more robust bias metrics for Chebyshev sequences at larger moduli
Implement higher-precision simulations to validate LDAB against Benford's law
